description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on opened and synchronized pull requests, and on a weekly schedule every Monday. The workflow has two jobs: build and check. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, from 3.6 to 3.10, on an ubuntu-18.04 environment. For each matrix entry, it checks out the code, sets up Python, installs poetry, configures it, installs dependencies, and runs tests with a custom script. The check job runs after build and verifies that all build jobs succeeded.
